calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Claire K. Woo was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the minor, Brianna Rae Baker.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

The Court cannot proceed with the proposed name change hearing as there is no proof of service in the case file indicated that the minor's father was given notice of today's hearing. Additionally, petitioner does not reside in San Francisco County.

Good cause appearing, this matter is taken OFF CALENDAR, and petitioner is instructed to seek assistance at the Access Center.
